{{CargoRelic
|name=Mordan Bullet
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=04-23
|source=Lottery Machine (0.07% chance), Novice Scrolls (1%), Wish (3.1%)
|description=On Apr 23, 1978, Mordan's daughter was killed by a bizarre bullet outside the battlefield.

This bullet was why Mordan betrayed the army. He used to be a highly-respected platoon commander, but when his daughter was brutally killed by a huge bullet, he decided to leave. Knowing that he could do nothing in the army, he resorted to betrayal to stop the war.
|fame=44
|art=29
|fth=20
|civ=34
|tech=27
|ss1=Per Apostle defeated, Snail +3<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss2=Per Apostle defeated, Snail +6<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss3=Per Apostle defeated, Snail +9<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss4=Per Apostle defeated, Snail +15<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15
|ss7=Per Apostle defeated, Snail +15<br>Apostles defeated: 15/15<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Bharata skill I.png|50px]]Place in Bharata Museum: In Bharata, Snail RUSH +20
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Bharata Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Bharata Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Offering Reward Boost]]
